idea-plugin.name: RESTful API Search
idea-plugin.description:
RESTful API Search

Quickly search and navigate to Spring REST API endpoints in your project.
快速搜索并跳转到 Spring 项目中的 REST API 端点。

✨ Features / 功能特性

  • Quick Launch / 一键呼出 — Ctrl+\ (macOS: Cmd+\) or Navigate → Search REST API Endpoints
  • Real-time Search / 实时搜索 — Filter by URL path, HTTP method, or class/method name
  • Segment Matching / 分段匹配 — Space-separated multi-keyword AND logic with continuous substring matching
  • HTTP Method Filter / 方法过滤 — Toolbar buttons to filter GET / POST / PUT / DELETE / PATCH / HEAD / OPTIONS
  • Color-coded Methods / 彩色标签 — Each HTTP method shown in a distinct color
  • Navigate to Source / 一键跳转 — Press Enter or double-click to jump to source code
  • Pin Popup / 固定弹窗 — Keep the popup open for multiple queries
  • Search History / 搜索历史 — Cycle through previous searches with Alt+↑ / Alt+↓
  • Annotation Support / 注解支持 — Auto-detects @RestController, @Controller and all Mapping annotations

action.description: Search and navigate to Spring REST API endpoints in the project
